queries.question: What is the rating of Breaking Bad?
queries.sql: SELECT Age_Rating.ageMinimum FROM Age_Rating JOIN Tv_Show ON Tv_Show.AgeRatingId = Age_Rating.ratingId WHERE Tv_Show.title = 'Breaking Bad';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?ageminimum WHERE {
  ?age_rating a :Age_Rating .
  ?tv_show a :Tv_Show .
  ?tv_show p:hasAge_Rating ?age_rating .
  ?age_rating p:ageMinimum ?ageminimum .
  ?tv_show p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Breaking Bad")
}

queries.question: What is the rating of Breaking Bad?
queries.sql: SELECT Critical_Rating.score FROM Critical_Rating JOIN Tv_Show ON Tv_Show.CriticalScoreId = Critical_Rating.ratingId WHERE Tv_Show.title = 'Breaking Bad';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?score WHERE {
  ?critical_rating a :Critical_Rating .
  ?tv_show a :Tv_Show .
  ?tv_show p:hasCritical_Rating ?critical_rating .
  ?critical_rating p:score ?score .
  ?tv_show p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Breaking Bad")
}

queries.question: What is the rating of Breaking Bad?
queries.sql: SELECT Age_Rating.ageMinimum FROM Age_Rating JOIN Tv_Show ON Tv_Show.AgeRatingId = Age_Rating.ratingId WHERE Tv_Show.title = 'Breaking Bad' UNION SELECT Critical_Rating.score FROM Critical_Rating JOIN Tv_Show ON Tv_Show.CriticalScoreId = Critical_Rating.ratingId WHERE Tv_Show.title = 'Breaking Bad';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?age_rating a :Age_Rating .
    ?tv_show a :Tv_Show .
    ?tv_show p:hasAge_Rating ?age_rating .
    ?age_rating p:ageMinimum ?ageminimum .
    ?tv_show p:title ?title_f .
    FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Breaking Bad")
    BIND(?ageminimum AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?critical_rating a :Critical_Rating .
    ?tv_show a :Tv_Show .
    ?tv_show p:hasCritical_Rating ?critical_rating .
    ?critical_rating p:score ?score .
    ?tv_show p:title ?title_f .
    FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Breaking Bad")
    BIND(?score AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: What are the lowest age and critical ratings?
queries.sql: SELECT MIN(ageMinimum) FROM Age_Rating UNION SELECT MIN(score) FROM Critical_Rating
queries.note: override OK (gold-SQL): aggregate (MIN) inside UNION -> two scalar sub-SELECTs unioned

queries.question: What is the lowest age rating?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MIN(?ageminimum_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?age_rating a :Age_Rating .
  ?age_rating p:ageMinimum ?ageminimum_a .
}

queries.question: What is the lowest critical rating?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MIN(?score_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?critical_rating a :Critical_Rating .
  ?critical_rating p:score ?score_a .
}
